title: Shear sheep to improver level
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Shear sheep to improver level demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for shearing

pcs.text: Identify relevant awards, agreements and workplace policies associated with shearing sheep
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant awards, agreements and workplace policies associated with shearing sheep?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant awards, agreements and workplace policies associated with shearing sheep.

pcs.text: Check shearing equipment for correct operation prior to shearing session according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check shearing equipment for correct operation prior to shearing session according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check shearing equipment for correct operation prior to shearing session according to workplace standards.

pcs.text: Select, use correctly and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use correctly and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use correctly and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Identify, catch and move sheep to required location in line with workplace work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, catch and move sheep to required location in line with workplace work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, catch and move sheep to required location in line with workplace work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards.

pcs.text: Identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and report to the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and report to the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and report to the supervisor.

pcs.text: Communicate with wool harvesting team members to ensure steady workflow according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to ensure steady workflow according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to ensure steady workflow according to workplace standards.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shear sheep using identified method and positions.

pcs.text: Use shearing methods that ensure that injuries and damage to the sheep and fleece are avoided while meeting volume expectations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use shearing methods that ensure that injuries and damage to the sheep and fleece are avoided while meeting volume expectations.

pcs.text: Use safe and humane handling techniques at all times according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe and humane handling techniques at all times according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe and humane handling techniques at all times according to workplace standards.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify flyblown sheep, dermatitis and black wool and report to supervisor.
